assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Asignar
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Asignar

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Asignar
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Asignar

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Asignar
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Asignar

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Asignar
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Asignar

formulas.name: ThisDate2MonthsAgo
formulas.expression: IF( MONTH(TODAY()) > 2, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()) - 2, DAY(TODAY())), DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, MONTH(TODAY()) + 10, DAY(TODAY())) )

formulas.name: ThisDate6MonthsAgo
formulas.expression: IF( MONTH(TODAY()) > 6, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()) - 6, DAY(TODAY())), DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, MONTH(TODAY()) + 6, DAY(TODAY())) )

recordLookups.name: GetTraficos
recordLookups.label: GetTraficos
recordLookups.filterLogic: ((1 AND 4) OR (2 AND 5) OR (3 AND 6))AND 7 AND 8 AND 9
